## **Bugs and stability** {#theme-bugs_stability}

   **Bugs and stability.**
      13 recent review(s) mention bugs and stability.
      Review window: May 20, 2026 - Jul 15, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users report reliability problems. This points to quality gaps competitors can exploit.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Shivam Pathak_, Jun 19, 2026, 1/5: "Hii, it's now been one month since I'm using the Zoho Notebook for my personal works and that too I migrated from the Evernote, Now I have some suggestions for you guys 1.app is good, while working on it some times it feels like lagging or slowed although I'm using your updated version. 2. Please make the options to highlight the texts as every time I have to click your highlighter options it's really frustrating, please fix it. 3. give more options for text styles 4 and also the text size."
            2. _Alex Mercer_, May 20, 2026, 1/5: "Absolutely avoid this app, it deletes the important notes you have created, out of nowhere, absolutely avoid this app, I have no idea if it's a bug or if someone who manages our information enjoys trolling us by deleting the most important notes. Definitely choose another app."
            3. _Ani Gopinathan Pillai_, Jul 15, 2026, 3/5: "I used to adore this app... until it got frustrating. Now it just crashes every time I open it ... I posted this review at least 3 times in 3 years and still the app just keeps on crashing on me when I need it most..."
